title: tetrarrhena oreophila var. oreophila
intro: Tetrarrhena oreophila var. oreophila, also known as the alpine spike-rush, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and digestive issues, offering benefits such as relieving coughs, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in modern medicine.
